zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Thomas Nevill於1293年之前與Sir Thomas Nevill在英國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs Thomas Nevill于1293年之前与Sir Thomas Nevill在英国结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Nevill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Neville
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Thomas Nevill married Sir Thomas Nevill before 1293, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Thomas Nevill a épousé Sir Thomas Nevill avant 1293, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs Thomas Nevill hat vor 1293 in England Sir Thomas Nevill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs Thomas Nevill lei sposato Sir Thomas Nevill prima del 1293, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Thomas Nevillは1293年以前にイギリスでSir Thomas Nevillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Thomas Nevill(은)는 1293년 이전 영국에서 Sir Thomas Nevill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs Thomas Nevill casou-se com Sir Thomas Nevill antes 1293, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Thomas Nevill вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Nevill перед 1293 г. в местности Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs Thomas Nevill se casó con Sir Thomas Nevill antes de 1293, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
